name: Phenmor
description: Zariman colonists originally intended to use the Phenmor in burial rites. In Orokin society, the higher the rank, the greater number of volleys for the deceased. Its stock is carved from Phenaureus Pine, a tree designed to release seedlings only onto scorched earth. In the hands of the Void, the Phenmor becomes darkly aggressive.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Entrati Lanthorn

A ceremonial beacon used to map Void locations on to real space.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos) and Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Pinion

A Void Angel's living feather, ripped out in combat.

Location: Zariman

components.name: Voidplume Quill
components.description:
A symbol of genius, fallen from Void Angels long ago.

Location: Zariman

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the water tank of the Soaktron skin appearing on the Phenmor’s Incarnon Form.

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Phenmor’s “50% more Incarnon charge on headshots” Evolution IV perk not working.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
The Phenmor can now equip owned Rifle skins! 
The Laetum and the Praedos were released with this option enabled, it is now the Phenmor’s turn! 
Fixed cases where the Laetum and the Phenmor were not counting headshots for Incarnon Form charge. 
Fixed the transformation timing on the Phenmor Evolution which cut off the sound FX.
Phenmor transmutation gauge

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.10 + 31.5.10.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed purchasing an Appearance Config Slot for the Phenmor prompting a confirmation for purchasing an Exilus Weapon Adapter for 20 Platinum instead of the 10 Platinum Appearance Config Slot as intended. 
For those who were affected up until this hotfix, upon login you will be given an Exilus Weapon Adapter for every slot purchased for the Phenmor. Purchased Appearance Config Slots will remain unaffected, you keep what you purchased! 
Due to some tech constraints, we weren’t able to run a script that would refund the Platinum difference while also distributing the consumed Adapter. If you would rather the 10 Platinum instead of the Adapters you may contact support.warframe.com with the subject line “Appearance Config Slot Inquiry for the Phenmor” or you can keep the “discounted” Exilus Weapon Adapter(s) (10 Platinum vs. 20).

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
Zariman colonists originally intended to use the Phenmor in burial rights. In Orokin society, the higher the rank, the greater number of volleys for the deceased. Its stock is carved from Phenaureus Pine, a tree designed to release seedlings only onto scorched earth. In the hands of the Void, the Phenmor becomes darkly aggressive.
Phenmor:
Phenmor 
When there is any amount of charge (indicated by the meter in the reticle for the Phenmor and Laetum, and a FX pulse on the Praedos), Incarnon Transmutation can be activated by using alt fire (Phenmor and Laetum) or Heavy Attack (Praedos). That same meter will drain as you use the weapon in its Incarnon Transmutation.
